text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 119 

HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_IND 

LABEL: Health Home Provider Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This code indicates whether the claim is submitted by a provider or provider group enrolled in the 
Health Home care model. Health home providers provide service for patients with chronic illnesses. 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_IND 

LONG NAME: HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
